---
name: Feature Request / 功能请求
description: Suggest a new feature or enhancement / 建议新功能或改进
about: Propose an idea to improve hermes-agent-cluster / 提出改进 hermes-agent-cluster 的想法
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Description / 问题描述

<!--
What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?
这个功能解决了什么问题？它满足了什么使用场景？
-->

## Proposed Solution / 提议的解决方案

<!--
Describe your ideal solution. How should it work?
描述你理想的解决方案。它应该如何工作？
-->

## Alternatives Considered / 考虑过的替代方案

<!--
Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?
你是否考虑过其他替代方案或临时解决办法？
-->

## Additional Context / 补充信息

<!-- Any other context (mockups, examples, related issues, etc.) -->
<!-- 其他上下文（设计稿、示例、相关 Issue 等） -->
